name: procurement supervisors in mid-sized retail companies using Shopify, processing 10-20 purchase orders/week tool
description: For procurement supervisors in mid-sized retail companies using Shopify processing 10-20 invoices/week, frequent changes cause confusion and potential errors. We aggregate purchase order changes and email change logs instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets and emails.
target_audience: procurement supervisors in mid-sized retail companies using Shopify, processing 10-20 purchase orders/week
problem_solved: Frequent changes to purchase orders lead to confusion and potential errors in procurement.
features: Weekly email summaries of purchase order changes
Manual entry option for changes not captured automatically
